zh.lifeSummary: 當Ankaret Burgh於1434年出生在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，她的父親John de Burgh III20歲，母親Jana de Clopton15歲。她和John Leighton至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於大約1471年在她的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ankaret Burgh于1434年出生在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，她的父亲John de Burgh III20岁，母亲Jana de Clopton15岁。她和John Leighton至少有4个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于大约1471年在她的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ankaret Burgh was born in 1434, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, her father, John de Burgh III, was 20 and her mother, Jana de Clopton, was 15. She had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with John Leighton. She died about 1471, in her hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ankaret Burgh est née en 1434, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Burgh III, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Jana de Clopton, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec John Leighton. Elle est décédée environ 1471, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ankaret Burgh 1434 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Burgh III 20 und ihre Mutter Jana de Clopton 15. Sie hatte mit John Leighton mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 1471 im Alter von 38 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ankaret Burgh è nata il nel 1434 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, sua padre, John de Burgh III, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Jana de Clopton, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con John Leighton. Morì circa 1471, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ankaret Burghが1434年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父John de Burgh IIIは20歳，母Jana de Cloptonは15歳であった。彼女はJohn Leightonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1471年に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ankaret Burgh(이)가 1434년 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Burgh III(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jana de Clopton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 John Leighton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1471년 그녀의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ankaret Burgh nasceu em 1434, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Burgh III, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Jana de Clopton, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas com John Leighton. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1471, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ankaret Burgh родилась в 1434 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Burgh III было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jana de Clopton, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от John Leighton. Она умерла около 1471 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.
